Foreword
The Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department was created
in 2010 in Tamil Nadu to attend exclusively to the needs of Differently Abled
Persons (DAPs). The DAPs require various services like Healthcare, Education
and accessible infrastructure which can be provided through co-ordinated
efforts across many sectors and departments.
